hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: What We're All About
hero.description: Welcome to Shikshanam – your doorway to the ancient wisdom of Indian philosophies, guided by a team fueled by curiosity and passion.

founder.title: Invite Vishal Chaurasia
founder.subtitle: Bring our founder's expertise to your event! Invite to your speaking engagements, interviews, podcasts, or collaborations. Let's inspire together!

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: Shikshanam was born from a deep reverence for India's ancient knowledge systems and a vision to make this profound wisdom accessible to everyone.
mission.paragraph2: We believe that the timeless teachings of Sanskrit, Yoga, Vedanta, and other Indian philosophies hold the key to modern living and personal transformation.
mission.visionText: To create a global community of learners who embrace ancient wisdom for modern living, fostering understanding, growth, and spiritual development.

team.title: Meet the Team
team.description: Our passionate team of educators, scholars, and technology experts work together to bring you the best learning experience.

members.name: Vishal Chaurasia
members.description: Expert in Sanskrit, Yoga, and Indian Philosophy with over 1.5M YouTube subscribers

members.name: Academic Team
members.description: Renowned scholars and practitioners in various fields of Indian knowledge systems

members.name: Technology Team
members.description: Dedicated to creating seamless learning experiences through modern technology

items.title: Comprehensive Courses
items.description: Structured learning paths in Sanskrit, Yoga, Vedanta, and ancient philosophy

items.title: Expert Guidance
items.description: Learn from experienced teachers and practitioners with deep knowledge

items.title: Community Support
items.description: Connect with fellow learners on the journey of wisdom and growth

items.title: Modern Technology
items.description: Ancient wisdom delivered through cutting-edge learning platforms

items.title: Flexible Learning
items.description: Study at your own pace with lifetime access to course materials

items.title: Certification
items.description: Receive certificates upon completion to validate your learning journey

items.title: Authenticity
items.description: We preserve the original teachings without dilution or distortion, maintaining the purity of ancient wisdom

items.title: Accessibility
items.description: Making profound knowledge available to everyone, regardless of background or prior experience

items.title: Community
items.description: Building connections between learners and teachers worldwide, fostering a supportive learning environment

items.title: Excellence
items.description: Committed to delivering the highest quality education and learning experiences

indianAesthetic.sanskritSubtitle: प्राचीन भारतीय ज्ञान की ओर एक यात्रा
indianAesthetic.sanskritDescription: हमारा उद्देश्य प्राचीन भारतीय शास्त्रों और संस्कृत भाषा को आधुनिक शिक्षार्थियों के लिए सुलभ और सरल बनाना है।
